_purpose: REFERENCE FILE -- not loaded by the engine. Copy parts you need into: asset-profiling-schema/azure.schema.custom.json. Loaded automatically by Get-SISchemaWithCustomMerge.ps1 and merged on top of asset-profiling-schema/azure.schema.locked.json.
_loadingNotes: Custom overlay:  asset-profiling-schema/azure.schema.custom.json   (you create -- this file is a sample of that)
Merge semantics: see asset-profiling-schema/endpoint.schema.custom.sample.json for the full table -- identical merge model.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 1: brand-new bool field with purpose=risk -- auto-included in every Azure RA report's RiskFactor_Probability + RiskFactor_Probability_Detailed.
fields.name: IsCustomerInternetExposed
fields.description: Customer-defined exposure check: combines NSG analysis + Front Door + App Gateway + custom WAF state. True when the resource is reachable from the public internet by ANY path.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 2: brand-new bool field for compliance tagging.
fields.name: FailedLastQuarterlyAudit
fields.description: True when the resource was flagged in our SOC 2 quarterly audit and the finding is still open.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 3: brand-new string field for cost-center routing.
fields.name: BusinessOwner
fields.description: Email of the named business owner. Sourced from the Azure tag 'Owner' OR from CMDB if present.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 4: REPLACE an existing locked field. Same name -> takes over the locked field entirely.
fields.name: Environment
fields.description: Customer override -- our default is Production (most workloads are prod) rather than empty string.

contributors._comment: Combine NSG + Front Door + App Gateway state into the IsCustomerInternetExposed bool.

arm._comment: Surface extra ARM tag values into Properties.collect.arm.tags.<key>.

exposureGraph._comment: Surface extra Defender Exposure Graph fields.
